name: Get a Weekly Toxic Backlink Monitoring Report via Email with DataForSEO

mapper.content:
Here is your weekly spam backlinks report for {{1.tasks[].data.target}}.

During the past week, we identified {{1.tasks[].result[].total_count}} potentially harmful backlinks based on the configured spam criteria.

You can review the full list here: Spam Backlinks to {{1.tasks[].data.target}} - {{formatDate(now; "YYYY-MM-DD")}}
mapper.subject: Spam Backlinks to {{1.tasks[].data.target}} - {{formatDate(now; "YYYY-MM-DD")}}
